name: llm-guard-kit
summary: v0.21.0: StreamGuardResult.skip_rewrite fast-path flag (59% chains skip QueryRewriter, save 400-800ms). AgentGuard.score_chain_guarded() latency-optimized scoring. Cross-domain few-shot calibration (exp_crossdomain_fewshot). v0.20.5: RAG agent P(True) 0.711 [0.633,0.783] on MuSiQue n=199.
